scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-tight font-bold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-bold

surfaces.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 border-[#171717] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#171717] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#171717]
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#171717] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
surfaces.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#171717] border-2 border-[#171717] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-colors hover:bg-[#F5F5F5] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#171717] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[2px] active:translate-x-[2px]
surfaces.button_accent_mint: bg-[#D1FAE5] text-[#171717] border-2 border-[#171717] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#171717] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#171717] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[2px] active:translate-x-[2px]
surfaces.input: bg-white border-2 border-[#171717] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#171717] focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#D1FAE5] transition-all

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing: use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. gap-6 to gap-10 for grids.
layouts.grid_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for main content, col-span-1 for sidebars.
layouts.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Hero elements span 8 cols, supporting span 4.

components.alumni_card: A bento-style card. Includes profile image, name (h3), college & stream, and a distinct Working Hours pill. The primary CTA 'Chat Now' should use button_secondary style.
components.working_hours_pill: Rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold border-2 border-[#171717]. If Available: bg-[#22C55E] text-white. If Unavailable: bg-[#F5F5F5] text-[#171717] with countdown.
components.alupal_chat: A visually distinct interface. AI messages have pale blue (#DBEAFE) backgrounds with hard borders. User messages have pale coral (#FFEDD5). DO NOT use purple (#7351B7).
components.leaderboard_row: Flex container. Top 3 ranks have distinct accent backgrounds (mint, yellow, blue) and border-2 border-[#171717].
components.scorecard: A striking certificate card. Use a heavy border, large typography for points/streak, and a bold accent color background. It should look like a premium printable ticket.

visual_enhancers.motion: Use crisp, snappy animations. Framer motion spring transitions with high stiffness. No slow, mushy eases.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Bold weights). Icons should feel chunky and deliberate.
visual_enhancers.textures: Clean flat colors. No gradients. The aesthetic relies entirely on high contrast borders, shadows, and pastel fills.

accessibility.contrast: Black/Charcoal text on pastel backgrounds naturally meets high APCA/WCAG contrast ratios.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must use the distinct shadow approach defined in 'input' surface rather than standard blurred rings.
accessibility.aria: Include aria-labels for icon-only buttons. All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.

images.description: Young adults studying with laptops on a campus outdoor table.
images.usage: Use in the landing page hero section to establish context.

images.description: Modern university building with trees casting shadows.
images.usage: Use as a background element or in the AluPal introduction section.

images.description: Portrait of a smiling young man in a classroom.
images.usage: Use as a placeholder image for alumni profile cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge sonner
Note: Use .js or .jsx extensions for files, NOT .tsx, as the project uses JavaScript.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing pages and Shadcn components customized with the defined surface classes for the app/dashboard.
Do NOT use pure transparent backgrounds for the header; use the 'glass_header' surface definition.
Ensure the 'AluPal' interface feels conversational but structured. Avoid ANY purple tones.
The Working Hours indicator is critical: build a robust component that clearly communicates availability using the defined pill styles.
For the certificate/scorecard, design it like a high-end printable ticket or badge (using the neo-brutalist shadow style).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and the hard shadow styles defined.
NEVER use placeholder text for images. Use the provided image URLs.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
